Design & Installation

Expert Fire Alarm Design-Build Services

Complete fire alarm systems from concept to final inspection. Design, installation, and commissioning—all under one roof.

Get Your Free Quote(925) 676-4444

Why Design-Build?

The design-build approach eliminates the delays and coordination headaches of traditional methods

Single Point of Accountability

One partner handles design, installation, and commissioning—eliminating coordination headaches.

Faster Permits

Deep relationships with Bay Area AHJs mean quicker permit approvals and fewer delays.

First-Time Inspection Success

Our pre-inspection protocols ensure your project passes on the first attempt.

Value Engineering

Optimize your design for cost without compromising safety or code compliance.

Our Process

A proven six-step approach that delivers results

01

Discovery & Design

We review your architectural plans, identify fire alarm requirements, and create detailed drawings.

02

Engineering & Calculations

Our NICET Level IV engineers perform voltage drop calculations and ensure code compliance.

03

Permit Submission

We handle all permit paperwork and coordinate with local authorities having jurisdiction (AHJs).

04

Installation

Our certified technicians install all equipment with minimal disruption to your operations.

05

Testing & Commissioning

Thorough testing ensures all systems function correctly before final inspection.

06

Final Inspection

We coordinate and accompany the AHJ through final inspection for smooth approval.

C-10 Licensed
NICET Level IV
UL Listed
Local Bay Area Team
